info.1: This is the number of verses you want to read each day.
info.2: If you read {dailyVerseCountGoal} verses a day, you will read the whole Bible in {bibleReadingDays} days.

info.1: My Bible Log will ignore your log entries before this date when counting your progress.
info.2: Log entries before this date still exist, and can be viewed and updated at any time.
info.3: This allows you to restart your Bible reading progress at any time.
info.4: For example, if you just read the entire Bible once, you can set your look back date to today to start reading it again.

info.1: External reading links will open this Bible translation in your preferred reading app.
External reading links will open this website or app.

callout.1: This setting is saved on this device rather than on your account.
callout.2: This means you can use different apps or websites for different devices.

messaging.daily_verse_count_goal_saved_successfull: Daily verse count goal saved successfully.
messaging.unable_to_save_daily_verse_count_goal: Unable to save. Please enter a number between 1 and 1111.
messaging.unable_to_save_look_back_date: Unable to save. Please enter a date no later than tomorrow.
messaging.preferred_bible_app_saved_successfully: Preferred Bible app saved successfully for this device.
